title: Blocks and Resources
description: This mod add to the game more items and blocks. It's simple
body:
# **Blocks and Resources**

Dive into the world of Blocks and Resources where you can expand your building and cooking abilities with new blocks, resources and items! This mod adds many unique elements to the game that will make your experience even more fun and diverse.
New Blocks and Items:

-     Yellow Crystal: A brightly coloured crystal that can be used to create various items and upgrades.
-     Unprocessed Yellow Crystal: A raw form of crystal that can be recycled into more useful materials.
-     Yellow Crystal Block: A sturdy block ideal for building and decorating.
-     Unprocessed Yellow Crystal Block: A block that can be used in crafting or as a building material.
-     Imperial Crystal Block: A rare and powerful block that adds unique abilities to the game.
## 
## **_New Food_**

-     Cucumbers: A crunchy vegetable that can be used in a variety of recipes.
-     Tomatoes: Juicy fruit, perfect for salads and other culinary masterpieces.
-     Sweet Peppers: A colourful and tasty ingredient for your dishes.
-     Coffee: An energy drink that will help you stay awake during your adventures.
-     Chocolate: A tasty treat that can be made with chocolate mix.
## **_New Armour and Tools_**

-     Yellow Crystal Armour: Durable and stylish armour that provides excellent protection.
-     Yellow Crystal Tools: Efficient tools for resource extraction and construction.
-     Yellow Crystal Horse Armour: Elegant armour that will protect your horse during your adventures.
## 
## **_New Mechanics_**

-     Refrigerator Block: A unique block that freezes chocolate mixture, turning it into chocolate.Perfect for creating sweet treats!

## **_New Ores_**

-     Yellow Crystal Deep Shale Ore: A rare ore that can be found at great depths, essential for creating powerful items.
-     Yellow Crystal Stone Ore: A more common ore that is also used for crafting.

And so much more!

# **Conclusion**

The Blocks and Resources mod offers players a lot of new opportunities for exploration and creativity. With new blocks, items and mechanics you will be able to significantly diversify your gameplay. Don't miss the chance to try all the innovations and share your impressions with your friends!
